error_signature: (#200) If posting to a group, requires app being installed in the group
title: Facebook Graph API posting permissions error
symptom: When attempting to post to a Facebook page using the Graph API, an error message indicates insufficient permissions related to posting.
not_this_if: Permissions are correctly set in the Graph API Explorer
root_cause: The error occurs because the required permissions for posting to a Facebook page are not granted to the token being used. Specifically, the page token must have both 'pages_read_engagement' and 'pages_manage_posts' permissions, and the app must be an admin of the page.
fix_steps: Open the Facebook Graph API Explorer
Ensure the page token is selected instead of the user token
Add the required permissions: pages_read_engagement and pages_manage_posts
Copy the updated page token and use it in your n8n workflow
agent_instruction: Update the Facebook Graph API node to use the correct page token with the necessary permissions.
